title: Shivaji University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Shivaji University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Shivaji University Result 2026 Out for UG and PG courses on the official website - unishivaji.ac.in on May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Shivaji University result.

content.text: Shivaji University has officially released the Shivaji University Result 2026 for various UG and PG courses. Students who appeared for the semester examinations can now check their results online for 1st, 2nd, 3rd and other semester exams. The results are available for multiple undergraduate and postgraduate programs conducted in the 2026 academic session.

Shivaji University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - http://unishivaji.ac.in/. Students can check and download their results by entering their roll number or seat number through the official result portal. It is advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result and contact the university in case of any discrepancies.

Shivaji University has published the latest UG and PG semester results for the 2026 academic session. Students can now access their results online through the official portal and download their provisional marksheets for reference.

Shivaji University has activated the direct link to check UG and PG semester results for the 2026 session. Students can easily view and download their results online using the official result portal link provided below.

links.label: Shivaji University UG PG Semester Result 2026

sections.heading: Steps to Check Shivaji University Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download your Shivaji University semester result:

items: Visit the official website of Shivaji University - http://unishivaji.ac.in/
Click on the "Results" section available on the homepage
You will be redirected to the result portal
Enter your seat number or roll number
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
